Nameplate Vision — live Gemini OCR test

36 random nameplate photos → POST /api/assets/ocr-nameplate (gemini-2.5-flash cascade) on servicecycle.app

28 / 36 read successfully
Mfr: 27/28Model: 20/28Serial: 18/28Voltage: 20/28kVA: 2/28Amps: 16/28Ph: 12/28Freq: 18/28Year: 7/28Encl: 6/28
The 8 "blocked" cards are not misreads. They hit the Google free-tier daily request ceiling — this test fired 100+ calls today (36 images × several passes while debugging), exhausting the per-day quota across every model in the cascade. They will read fine after the quota resets, or immediately on a paid tier. Two real bugs were found & fixed during this run: the cascade's dead gemini-1.5-flash fallback (Google retired it → 404) and a 512-token output cap that truncated denser plates.
